common.readOnlyNotice: You have read-only access. Settings changes require admin or owner role.

relativeTime.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relativeTime.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

forbidden.title: Insufficient permissions
forbidden.message: You do not have access to this page. Contact a workspace owner if you need access.

signIn.heading: Sign in to PipeWatch
signIn.subtext: Your GitHub account is all you need.
signIn.footnote: Don't have an account? Signing in creates one.

bootstrap.freshInstall: Fresh install detected — no users yet
bootstrap.heading: Welcome to PipeWatch CE
bootstrap.subtext: You're the first user. Sign in with GitHub to create your admin account. You'll have full owner access to this instance.
bootstrap.infoText: This screen disappears after your account is created. Additional users can be invited from <settings>Settings → Members</settings>.
bootstrap.helpLink: Need help? Read the CE setup guide →

createWorkspace.title: Create your workspace
createWorkspace.subtitle: A workspace groups the repositories you want to monitor together.
createWorkspace.slugInvalid: Enter a valid slug (letters, numbers, hyphens)
createWorkspace.planProHint: Upgrade after setup — 50 repos, longer retention
createWorkspace.planLimitHint: Free includes up to {repoLimit} repos. Upgrade anytime in billing settings.
createWorkspace.toastCreatedDescription: Sign in again if GitHub setup fails.
createWorkspace.toastErrorDescription: Check the name and slug, then try again.

installGithub.title: Install the GitHub App
installGithub.subtitle: PipeWatch needs read access to your GitHub Actions data.
installGithub.actionsDescription: Workflow runs, jobs, steps, and timing data
installGithub.metadataDescription: Repository names, visibility, and branch info
installGithub.noWriteDescription: PipeWatch cannot trigger, cancel, or modify runs
installGithub.noCodeDescription: File contents, commits, and pull requests are not readable
installGithub.notConfigured: GitHub App install is not configured yet. Set GITHUB_APP_SLUG on the API server and refresh this page.
installGithub.manualLabel: Already installed? Enter your installation ID manually.

selectRepos.title: Select repositories
selectRepos.subtitle: Choose which repositories PipeWatch should track. You can change this later in settings.
selectRepos.planLimitHint: You can track up to {repoLimit} repos on the Free plan.
selectRepos.loadError: We could not load repositories from GitHub.
selectRepos.discovering: Discovering repositories from your GitHub installation…
selectRepos.syncProgress: Syncing {count, plural, one {# repo} other {# repos}} — fetching run history…
selectRepos.toastErrorDescription: Try again or continue to the dashboard.

done.title: You're all set
done.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# repository} other {# repositories}} connected. Backfill is running in the background.
done.tipLiveUpdates: Live updates appear automatically on your dashboard.
done.tipPolling: Set up polling mode per repo in repository settings.
done.tipInvite: Invite teammates from workspace settings when you're ready.

error.expiredMessage: This invite has expired. Ask a workspace admin to send a new invite.
error.acceptedMessage: This invite has already been accepted.
error.invalidMessage: This invite link is invalid or has been revoked.

join.heading: Join workspace
join.subtext: You've been invited to collaborate on PipeWatch.
join.wrongAccount: This invite was sent to a different email address. Sign out and sign in with the invited email, then try again.

toast.joinedDescription: Refresh or sign in again if the dashboard does not load.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadError: We could not load the dashboard.

empty.title: No repos connected yet
empty.description: Connect GitHub and select repositories to monitor pipeline runs from one place.

table.empty: No repositories match the current filters.

repos.title: Repository
repos.loadError: We could not load this repository.

empty.title: No runs yet for this repo
empty.description: Runs appear here once GitHub Actions workflows execute on this repository.

resync.startedDescription: Fetching the latest runs from GitHub.

activeRunBanner.runsInProgress: {count, plural, one {# run in progress} other {# runs in progress}}

runs.title: Workflow run
runs.loadError: We could not load this workflow run.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.empty: No jobs recorded for this run yet.

jobPanel.empty: No steps recorded for this job.
